queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account serves as a significant credit risk driver contributing to elevated determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into the role of minimal savings account balances below 100 DM as a mitigating factor that reduces credit risk drivers and default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how negative checking account balances function as a counterintuitive protective determinant in credit risk assessment and default probability modeling.
